title: Otha Sollaala  lyrics Aadukalam songs lyrics
stanzas:
Hey, otha sollaala yen usireduthu vachikitah
Retta kannaala enna thinnaadhaa
Pacha thanni pol ada sombukulla ootthi-vachhi
Nitham-kudichu enna konnaada

Ye pottakaattula
aalangatti  mazhapenji aaronnu oduradhap-paaru
Ada pattaa poochidhaan en sattayilla ottikichhu
pattaasu pola, nan vedichen
Mutta kannaala en muchha-eduthu ponavadhaan
Thotta pinaala yedho aanenda

Ye onkathamma theerthuponadha
Andha kannaadiyum kaduppu aanadhey
Nan kuppurathaan paduthu kedandhen
Enna kudhuramela yethi-vitaaya
Onnum sollaama, usura thottaaya
Manasa inika vachha cheeni mittaye

Hey, otha sollaala yen usireduthu vachikitah
Retta kannaala enna thinnaadhaa
Pacha thanni pol ada sombukulla ootthi-vachhi
Nitham-kudichu enna konnaada

Ye katta vandi katti vandhudhan
Ava kanazhaga paathu pongadaa
Ada kattu choru katti vandhudhaan
Ava kaluthalaga paathu pongadaa
Kathaazha pazha sivappu
Muthaadha elanjirippu
Vathaadha ava iduppu naa thirrugatha

Hey, otha sollaala yen usireduthu vachikitah
Retta kannaala enna thinnaadhaa
Pacha thanni pol ada sombukulla ootthi-vachhi
Nitham-kudichu enna konnaada

Ada ration cardil pera yethuven
Oru naal kuruchi thattu maathuven
Ye oorukellam sedhi solluven
Ava kaadhil mattum meedhi solluven
pOnnu karupatti kannu theeepatti
Mennu thinnaale enna oru vaatiii yehe

Hey, otha sollaala yen usireduthu vachikitah
Retta kannaala enna thinnaadhaa
Pacha thanni pol ada sombukulla ootthi-vachhi
Nitham-kudichu enna konnaada

Ye potta-kaattula, aalangatti  mazhapenji aaronnu oduradhap-paaru
Ada pattaa poochidhaan en sattayilla ottikichhu
pattaasu pola, nan vedichen
Mutta kannaala en muchha-eduthu ponavadhaan
Thotta pinaala yedho aanenda

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Otha Sollaala, the protagonist expresses a carefree and joyful attitude towards life, celebrating the little pleasures and the thrill of living in the moment. The song is set against the backdrop of the movie Aadukalam, where it reflects the vibrant culture and festive spirit of the characters. With its catchy rhythm and lively lyrics, it evokes feelings of happiness and energy, making it perfect for celebrations and parties.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Otha Sollaala from Aadukalam is a vibrant celebration of life and joy, brought to life by the energetic vocals of Velmurugan. With GV Prakash Kumar's infectious beats and Yegathasi's clever lyrics, this song captures the essence of festive spirit. It's a must-listen for anyone looking to uplift their mood and dance along!
stanzaMeanings: Hey, don't say anything, my life is in trouble. What can I eat with these two eyes? Like green water, I have poured it into a pot. Drinking it daily is killing me.

In this place, the rain has fallen and people are running away. That song has taken away my peace, like a thief. I am troubled by my eyes, which have taken away my happiness. Something is wrong with my heart.
What has happened to this situation? That mirror has also become a problem. I have fallen into trouble. Without saying anything, my life is in danger. Today, my mind has become like sugar.
Hey, don't say anything, my life is in trouble. What can I eat with these two eyes? Like green water, I have poured it into a pot. Drinking it daily is killing me.
That vehicle has come and stopped. She is looking beautiful. That food has come and stopped. She is looking lovely. The old red color is still there. I am not able to bear her beauty.
Hey, don't say anything, my life is in trouble. What can I eat with these two eyes? Like green water, I have poured it into a pot. Drinking it daily is killing me.
What name should I put on the ration card? I will change it in a day. I will tell everyone in this town. I will only tell her in love. If I eat something, it will be a big deal.
Hey, don't say anything, my life is in trouble. What can I eat with these two eyes? Like green water, I have poured it into a pot. Drinking it daily is killing me.

In this place, the rain has fallen and people are running away. That song has taken away my peace, like a thief. I am troubled by my eyes, which have taken away my happiness. Something is wrong with my heart.
